tags.description:en: Constituent country of the Kingdom of the Netherlands.
tags.description:nl: Constituerend land van het Koninkrijk der Nederlanden.
tags.name: Curaçao
tags.name:lo: ເຄີເລັກຄາວ
tags.note:ISO3166-2: Curaçao is a subset (type Country) of the Kingdom of the Netherlands (ISO3166-1 country code NL)
tags.timezone:note: America/Curacao was used when this was part of Netherlands Antilles, it does not seem to have changed since the separation into separate countries.
